description: Register a dagster-aws S3Resource for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

aws_access_key_id_env_var.label: AWS Access Key ID Env Var
aws_access_key_id_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the AWS access key ID

aws_secret_access_key_env_var.label: AWS Secret Access Key Env Var
aws_secret_access_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the AWS secret access key

endpoint_url.label: Endpoint URL
endpoint_url.description: Custom endpoint URL for MinIO or LocalStack, e.g. 'http://localhost:9000'
